description: Letter from one of the Sughmār family to Nahray b. Nissim. Around 1080. The main part of the letter is a recommendation for a person named Isḥāq, the student of Isḥāq al-Ifranji. The writer also mentions business matters: dinars exchange and a request to pay the rent for two houses that he rented to Nahray in Alexandria. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #626) VMR
description_he: מכתב ממשפחת סוגמאר לנהראי בן ניסים, כ-1080
